b:T35d11,<div class="specification">
<p>The image on the left shows a developing neuron on the first day of culture (day 1). The image on the right shows the same neuron after one day (day 2).</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: The establishment of polarity by hippocampal neurons<br/>in culture, CG Dotti, CA Sullivan and GA Banker, <em>Journal of Neuroscience</em> 1 April 1988, 8 (4) 1454–1468;<br/>DOI: https://doi.org/10.1523/JNEUROSCI.08-04-01454.1988, Copyright ©1988 Society for Neuroscience.]</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Describe the changes occurring in this neuron from day 1 to day 2.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Suggest other processes that may occur during neural development.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Suggest what can happen to neurons that are unused in the nervous system.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/a/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>a. branches (of dendrites/axons) formed<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>new/more dendrites formed;</p>\n<p>b. dendrites/axons grow/get longer;</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>a. neural tube differentiation/formation;</p>\n<p>b. neuron (may) migrate to other parts;</p>\n<p>c. axon (may) extend beyond the neural tube/myelinates;</p>\n<p>d. synapses develop;</p>\n<p>e. neural pruning;</p>\n<p><em>Do not accept “connection” instead of “synapse”</em>.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>a. neural pruning;</p>\n<p>b. neurons are destroyed / apoptosis</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Many candidates could describe at least one change occurring, but many used terminology for processes occurring at later stages that were not shown on the photographs.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Most candidates suggested correctly at least one other process, and stronger candidates suggested two.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>The vast majority of candidates correctly suggested neural pruning.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
